warnings: One of 3 views on this page; siblings are the fence section (_view2_fence_type2_section.json) and column/beam/lintel expansion details (_view3_fence_type2_column_beam_lintel_details.json).
This is the LAST architecture sheet (A-27 of 27 total). All 27 architecture sheets (pages 3-29) are now personally completed/verified for this house.

Fence type 2 shares the same column C1 / ground beam GB / footing F / pile system as fence type 1 (A-26) -- only the infill differs (concrete block wall + RC lintel here, vs. steel picket panel on type 1).
